en: This isn't a steak why would you call it that on your menu I don't know what to tell you
ko: 이것은 스테이크가 아니는데 왜 메뉴에 이렇게 적었을까 나는 당신에게 뭐라고 말해야 할지 모르겠어

en: Eggs what I said was give me all the bacon and eggs you have do you
